runtime_owned_skills.do: Harness-level Do is owned by the Pi runtime extension command, not distributed as a normal skill.
runtime_owned_skills.done: Done is a Pi runtime completion outcome, not a normal skill.
runtime_owned_skills.escalate: Escalation is a Pi runtime blocker outcome, not a normal skill.

extension_wrappers.auto: Provided by /auto (core package), which runs the manifest-dev lifecycle through the Pi Harness-level Do outcome gate.
extension_wrappers.babysit-pr: Provided by /babysit-pr (tools package), which synthesizes PR lifecycle grounding and runs it through the Pi Harness-level Do outcome gate.

agents_note._note: manifest-dev ships zero agents. Quality review is the `review-code` skill (one dimension per invocation); the former functional agents are skills too (`check-pr`, `poll-slack`, `review-prompt`), shipped under dist/pi/skills/. Verification is always a general-purpose subagent whose verify.prompt activates a skill — there is no verify.agent field.

commands.do: Pi Harness-level Do entrypoint for an existing manifest (core package).
commands.auto: Pi wrapper for autonomous figure-out -> define -> Harness-level Do (core package).
commands.babysit-pr: Pi wrapper for PR lifecycle manifest synthesis and Harness-level Do (tools package).

runtime_internal.verification: Runtime-owned verifier fanout over manifest Acceptance Criteria and Global Invariants; not exposed as an executor-callable tool.
runtime_internal.outcome: Runtime-owned done and blocker outcomes after verifier fanout; not exposed as an executor-callable tool.

runtime_dependencies.@gotgenes/pi-subagents: Required for clean verifier subagent sessions.
